notes: 2026-07-03 batch: 24 artifacts, ~$8 total estimated spend (see genmedia-experiments.md). Not itemized at the time — logged retroactively per-item below with cost_usd=null/unknown. Itemize cost_usd going forward so per-final totals resolve.

settings.prompt_gist: red disc starts spinning in hand, dolly-in, lens flare

generations.notes: clean, subtle, usable as-is

settings.prompt_gist: push-in, disc spins, red light glow on sleeve

generations.notes: close to A1; kling slightly smoother hand

settings.prompt_gist: claw marks ignite from within, embers drift, menacing zoom

generations.notes: ember glow looks REAL against real street

settings.prompt_gist: red title text pulses like neon, smoke curls, dusk mood

generations.notes: full relight to dusk — moodiest asset of the day

settings.prompt_gist: three sleeves levitate + fan apart mid-air like card trick

generations.notes: sleeves drift off-model (lose artwork) — weakest

settings.prompt_gist: red vinyl slides out, floats up, spins to fill frame

generations.notes: ends INSIDE the red disc w/ sun flare — ending asset

settings.prompt_gist: orbital camera around red disc + fan, bass hum + crackle

generations.notes: premium trailer energy, native audio decent

settings.prompt_gist: 1998 VHS camcorder freeze-frame, REC + timestamp

generations.notes: flawless VHS, funny contrast w/ pristine product

settings.prompt_gist: Y2K sticker-bomb zine collage around the 3 sleeves

generations.notes: loud thumbnail/carousel energy; some text gibberish (SRLING)

settings.prompt_gist: red vinyl on turntable in smoky neon bodega

generations.notes: scene transplant is perfect, label readable

settings.prompt_gist: cover on Times Square billboard, rain, crowds

generations.notes: epic scale flex (16:9)

settings.prompt_gist: claw marks ripping open FOR REAL, red vinyl glowing inside

generations.notes: best single image of the day

settings.prompt_gist: macro needle-drop on red vinyl, smoke, dust, audio

generations.notes: gorgeous cinematic b-roll, loopable

settings.prompt_gist: claymation: 3 sleeves with legs strut down a stoop

generations.notes: unhinged in the right way — most gen-z thing here

settings.prompt_gist: flythrough INSIDE the grooves, red canyon walls

generations.notes: surreal epic; abstract (no product ID until end)

settings.prompt_gist: recreate the pull as 90s anime cel

generations.notes: style IGNORED — but faithfully re-staged the real shot (interesting for reshoots, not restyle)

settings.prompt_gist: red disc spins in void, claw etched in embers behind

generations.notes: moody album-trailer beat, on-brand

settings.prompt_gist: box dissolves into red smoke that condenses into the disc

generations.notes: red smoke vortex mid-morph; slightly literal but works as transition

settings.technique: two-step pipeline: nano-banana still -> seedance animates it

generations.notes: pipeline WORKS — styled still becomes living scene

generations.notes: strongest hook of the day, period

generations.notes: great, but came out 16:9 (billboard seed is landscape)

settings.prompt_gist: red takeover: product open, disc spins B&W world, street floods red, sleeves rain, turntable + OUT NOW end card

generations.notes: followed the ENTIRE script incl. text end card — best single generation so far

settings.prompt_gist: claymation heist: sleeves steal red disc from record store, cat chase, GOT THE TRILOGY card

generations.notes: Aardman-quality, complete story w/ end card

settings.prompt_gist: reality breaks: faithful re-stage of real pull -> datamosh -> zero-g -> ride INTO the groove -> snap back

generations.notes: video ref anchors to our real shot then goes surreal

settings.prompt_gist: 90s VHS infomercial parody: BUT WAIT, watermelon slice, astronaut DJ, NOT $19.99 PRICELESS

generations.notes: meme-dense, every beat rendered

settings.prompt_gist: hooded-figures ritual version

generations.notes: content_policy_violation: 'Output audio has sensitive content' AFTER full 7-min inference (still billed)

settings.prompt_gist: softened listening-party version, audio still on

generations.notes: same audio moderation rejection — generated audio is the tripwire, not the visuals

settings.prompt_gist: listening-party ritual -> party flip, graffiti end cards THE TRILOGY ON WAX / HITS DIFFERENT

generations.notes: silent render passed moderation

settings.prompt_gist: instrumental trap beat + vinyl crackle foley; negative: speech/vocals

generations.notes: AI foley rescue for the audio-moderation gotcha

settings.context_thread: blog-era nostalgia (2026 'blog era boyz' w/ mgk = same Sledgren/ID Labs producers as Cabin Fever)
settings.prompt_gist: time machine: 2026 street -> VHS rewind -> 2011 dorm download bar -> pixels shatter into red vinyl -> back to 2026; end cards YOU USED TO DOWNLOAD THIS / NOW ITS ON WAX / FIRST TIME EVER ON VINYL

generations.notes: concept only exists because of the context research; end-card text rendered flawlessly (incl. apostrophe); MISS: flashback-scene sleeve art drifted off-model (invented gold cover) — scenes far from the reference images invite product drift

settings.context_thread: real product facts (34 tracks; Taylor Gang / M.I.A. / GangBang / No Worries; red-foil box treatment)
settings.prompt_gist: kinetic typography: track titles peel off the real back cover as red-foil 3D letters, tornado around spinning disc, slam back; end cards 34 TRACKS / ONE BOX / ALL RED WAX

generations.notes: peel-off-the-cardboard concept made literal (torn holes in the box); short end cards clean; long floating titles have typos (BIIG) — keep AI-rendered text <= 3 words, put long titles in ffmpeg overlays

finals.notes: F2 torn-cover hook ("the pressing on this goes CRAZY") -> real v3. 18.8s total, ready to post.
F1 bodega hook ("POV your bodega got the wiz trilogy on wax") -> real v2. 24.2s total, POV-format native.
real cover -> E1 smoke morph -> real red showcase -> real closer. 16.2s total, AI as invisible transition.

components.ref: raw MOV, 8 beats w/ punch-in jump cuts + captions

finals.notes: 17.3s gen-z supercut: 15 beats ~1.1s each alternating AI/real, caption per beat, one 0.85x slow-mo.
